description_long: This object is a stylized flower with a geometric, blocky design reminiscent of pixel art or construction toys. The flower features a prominent red corolla with five distinct, squared petals arranged radially around a central yellow and blue structure, which may represent the reproductive parts of the flower. The stem is green, straight, and segmented, with a few angular protrusions that suggest simplified leaves or nodes. The petals are thick and evenly spaced, creating a symmetrical, whorled appearance. The central part of the flower is elevated and contrasts sharply in color, drawing attention to the flower's core. The overall form is upright and compact, making it suitable for decorative placement in urban parks, sidewalks, or public gardens.
description: A stylized, blocky red flower with a green segmented stem and a central yellow-blue core, featuring five thick, squared petals arranged symmetrically. The design is geometric and visually striking, ideal for urban decorative use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red petals with a clear view of the central yellow and blue core, and the green stem with side protrusions.
description_view_1: This view highlights the depth of the petals and the central core, with the left side of the stem and petals more visible.
description_view_2: The back of the flower is visible, showing the symmetry of the petals and the segmented stem with more pronounced side protrusions.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the right side of the flower, with the blue core and petal arrangement still prominent.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration with clear symmetry and no visible overlap, each petal spaced evenly around the central core.
